name: Jesse Crypto Trading Bot
description: An advanced open-source crypto trading bot written in Python. Supports backtesting, live trading, strategy optimization, candle importing, Monte Carlo simulations, and 100+ technical indicators. Works with Binance, Bybit, Bitfinex and more.

capabilities.name: Backtest Strategy
capabilities.description: Run historical backtests on custom trading strategies using OHLCV candle data

capabilities.name: Import Candle Data
capabilities.description: Fetch and store historical OHLCV price data from supported crypto exchanges

capabilities.name: Optimize Strategy
capabilities.description: Run hyperparameter optimization using genetic algorithms or grid search

capabilities.name: Live Trade
capabilities.description: Execute real-time trades via exchange APIs

capabilities.name: Technical Indicators
capabilities.description: Access 100+ technical indicators: RSI, MACD, EMA, Bollinger Bands, ATR, etc.

capabilities.name: Monte Carlo Simulation
capabilities.description: Stress-test strategies using randomized scenario simulations
